title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.134 - United States flag and state flag to be flown at half-staff on September 11
text:
9.134.  United States flag and state flag to be flown at half-staff on September 11. — The United States flag and the Missouri state flag shall be flown at half-staff on all government buildings on each September eleventh in honor of the individuals who died as a result of the terrorist attacks against the United States on September 11, 2001.
(L. 2006 H.B. 983)
